# Gcore Edge Proxy

> Deploy Edge Proxy DDoS protection on Gcore CDN edge infrastructure using Anycast IP addresses, translation rules mapping origin IP/port/protocol/application type, and globally distributed Points of Presence for multi-terabit filtering capacity.

- [Overview](https://docs.gcore.com/edge-proxy/overview.md): Deploy Edge Proxy DDoS protection on Gcore CDN edge infrastructure using Anycast IP addresses, translation rules mapping origin IP/port/protocol/application type, and globally distributed Points of Presence for multi-terabit filtering capacity.
- [Setup and configuration](https://docs.gcore.com/edge-proxy/setup-and-configuration.md): Configure Edge Proxy DDoS protection via the Customer Portal - add port mappings, get a protected IP, edit or delete proxies, and monitor traffic metrics.
- [FAQs and trobleshooting](https://docs.gcore.com/edge-proxy/faqs-and-trobleshooting.md): Configure Edge Proxy DDoS protection for TCP and UDP applications by assigning protected Anycast IP addresses, creating proxy rules with application type selection, and updating DNS A or AAAA records to route traffic through Gcore CDN edge network Points of Presence.
